required_topics: definition of human trafficking and commercial exploitation of children
guidance on identifying individuals most at risk for human trafficking
difference between human trafficking for labor and sex as it relates to lodging establishments, restaurants, or truck stops
role of lodging establishment employees in reporting and responding to instances of human trafficking
law_references: Human Trafficking Recognition Training for Employers in Illinois
risks_or_constraints: noncompliance with training requirements can result in fines up to $1,500 per offense
State's Attorney can bring a civil action against non-compliant employers
